statement: The sub-0.80 recall at 1 result for memory systems reflects default out-of-the-box configuration rather than capability ceilings: at least one subject reaches mean recall at 1 >= 0.80 at 10-session depth when configured per its vendor's published best-practice guide
falsification_criteria: If every subject, configured per its vendor's published best-practice guide, still scores mean recall@1 < 0.80 (N>=10 runs) at 10-session depth, this claim is falsified: the default configuration was not what produced the result.
